options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: gate_boss_plando
options.description:
Possible Locations:
"Gate 1 Boss"
"Gate 2 Boss"
"Gate 3 Boss"
"Gate 4 Boss"
"Gate 5 Boss"

Possible Bosses:
"Sonic vs Shadow 1"
"Sonic vs Shadow 2"
"Tails vs Eggman 1"
"Tails vs Eggman 2"
"Knuckles vs Rouge 1"
"BIG FOOT"
"HOT SHOT"
"FLYING DOG"
"Egg Golem (Sonic)"
"Egg Golem (Eggman)"
"King Boom Boo"

options.name: ring_link
options.description: Whether your in-level ring gain/loss is linked to other players

options.name: trap_link
options.description:
Whether your received traps are linked to other players

You will also receive any linked traps from other players with Trap Link enabled,
if you have a weight above "none" set for that trap

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines the goal of the seed

Biolizard: Finish Cannon's Core and defeat the Biolizard and Finalhazard

Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds and reach Green Hill Zone

Finalhazard Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds and reach Green Hill Zone, then defeat Finalhazard

Grand Prix: Win every race in Kart Race Mode (all standard levels are disabled)

Boss Rush: Beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard

Cannon's Core Boss Rush: Beat Cannon's Core, then beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard

Boss Rush Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds, then beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard

Chaos Chao: Raise a Chaos Chao to win

Minigame Madness: Win a certain amount of each Minigame Trap, then defeat Finalhazard

options.name: boss_rush_shuffle
options.description:
Determines how bosses in Boss Rush Mode are shuffled

Vanilla: Bosses appear in the Vanilla ordering

Shuffled: The same bosses appear, but in a random order

Chaos: Each boss is randomly chosen separately (one will always be King Boom Boo)

Singularity: One boss is chosen and placed in every slot (one will always be replaced with King Boom Boo)

options.name: minigame_madness_requirement
options.description:
Determines how many of each Minigame Trap must be won (for Minigame Madness goal)

Receiving this many of a Minigame Trap will allow you to replay that minigame at-will in the Chao World lobby

options.name: minigame_madness_minimum
options.description:
Determines the minimum number of each Minigame Trap that are created (for Minigame Madness goal)

At least this many of each trap will be created as "Progression Traps", regardless of other trap option selections

options.name: logic_difficulty
options.description:
What set of Upgrade Requirement logic to use

Standard: The logic assumes the "intended" usage of Upgrades to progress through levels

Hard: Some simple skips or sequence breaks may be required, but no out-of-bounds

Expert: If it is humanly possible, it may be required

options.name: required_rank
options.description: Determines what minimum Rank is required to send a check for a mission

options.name: max_emblem_cap
options.description:
Determines the maximum number of emblems that can be in the item pool.

If fewer available locations exist in the pool than this number, the number of available locations will be used instead.

Gate and Cannon's Core costs will be calculated based off of that number.

options.name: ring_loss
options.description:
How taking damage is handled

Classic: You lose all of your rings when hit

Modern: You lose 20 rings when hit

OHKO: You die immediately when hit (NOTE: Some Hard or Expert Logic tricks may require damage boosts!)

options.name: mission_shuffle
options.description: Determines whether missions order will be shuffled per level

options.name: required_cannons_core_missions
options.description:
Determines how many Cannon's Core missions must be completed (for Biolizard or Cannon's Core goals)

First: Only the first mission must be completed

All Active: All active Cannon's Core missions must be completed

options.name: emblem_percentage_for_cannons_core
options.description: Allows logic to gate the final mission behind a number of Emblems

options.name: number_of_level_gates
options.description: The number emblem-locked gates which lock sets of levels

options.name: level_gate_distribution
options.description:
Determines how levels are distributed between level gate regions

Early: Earlier regions will have more levels than later regions

Even: Levels will be evenly distributed between all regions

Late: Later regions will have more levels than earlier regions

options.name: level_gate_costs
options.description: Determines how many emblems are required to unlock level gates

options.name: keysanity
options.description:
Determines whether picking up Chao Keys grants checks
(86 Locations)

options.name: whistlesanity
options.description:
Determines whether whistling at various spots grants checks

None: No Whistle Spots grant checks

Pipes: Whistling at Pipes grants checks (97 Locations)

Hidden: Whistling at Hidden Whistle Spots grants checks (32 Locations)

Both: Whistling at both Pipes and Hidden Whistle Spots grants checks (129 Locations)

options.name: beetlesanity
options.description:
Determines whether destroying Gold Beetles grants checks
(27 Locations)

options.name: omosanity
options.description:
Determines whether activating Omochao grants checks
(192 Locations)

options.name: animalsanity
options.description:
Determines whether unique counts of animals grant checks.
(422 Locations)

ALL animals must be collected in a single run of a mission to get all checks.

options.name: itemboxsanity
options.description:
Determines whether collecting Item Boxes grants checks
None: No Item Boxes grant checks
Extra Lives: Extra Life Boxes grant checks (94 Locations)
All: All Item Boxes grant checks (502 Locations Total)

options.name: bigsanity
options.description:
Determines whether helping Big fish grants checks.
(32 Locations)

options.name: kart_race_checks
options.description:
Determines whether Kart Race Mode grants checks

None: No Kart Races grant checks

Mini: Each Kart Race difficulty must be beaten only once

Full: Every Character must separately beat each Kart Race difficulty

options.name: black_market_slots
options.description: Determines how many multiworld items are available to purchase from the Black Market

options.name: black_market_unlock_costs
options.description: Determines how many Chao Coins are required to unlock sets of Black Market items

options.name: black_market_price_multiplier
options.description:
Determines how many rings the Black Market items cost

The base ring costs of items in the Black Market range from 50-100, and are then multiplied by this value

options.name: chao_race_difficulty
options.description:
Determines the number of Chao Race difficulty levels included. Easier difficulty settings means fewer Chao Race checks

None: No Chao Races have checks

Beginner: Beginner Races

Intermediate: Beginner, Challenge, Hero, and Dark Races

Expert: Beginner, Challenge, Hero, Dark and Jewel Races

options.name: chao_karate_difficulty
options.description: Determines the number of Chao Karate difficulty levels included. (Note: This setting requires purchase of the "Battle" DLC)

options.name: chao_stadium_checks
options.description:
Determines which Chao Stadium activities grant checks

All: Each individual race and karate fight grants a check

Prize: Only the races which grant Chao Toys grant checks (final race of each Beginner and Jewel cup, 4th, 8th, and 12th Challenge Races, 2nd and 4th Hero and Dark Races, final fight of each Karate difficulty)

options.name: chao_animal_parts
options.description:
Determines whether giving Chao various animal parts grants checks
(73 Locations)

options.name: chao_stats
options.description:
Determines the highest level in each Chao Stat that grants checks
(Swim, Fly, Run, Power)

options.name: chao_stats_frequency
options.description:
Determines how many levels in each Chao Stat grant checks (up to the maximum set in the `chao_stats` option)

`1` means every level is included, `2` means every other level is included, `3` means every third, and so on

options.name: chao_stats_stamina
options.description: Determines whether Stamina is included in the `chao_stats` option

options.name: chao_stats_hidden
options.description: Determines whether the hidden stats (Luck and Intelligence) are included in the `chao_stats` option

options.name: chao_kindergarten
options.description:
Determines whether learning the lessons from the Kindergarten Classroom grants checks
(WARNING: VERY SLOW)

None: No Kindergarten classes have checks

Basics: One class from each category (Drawing, Dance, Song, and Instrument) is a check (4 Locations)

Full: Every class is a check (23 Locations)

options.name: shuffle_starting_chao_eggs
options.description: Determines whether the starting Chao eggs in the gardens are random

options.name: chao_entrance_randomization
options.description: Determines whether entrances in Chao World are randomized

options.name: junk_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of non-required emblems in the item pool with random junk items

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.name: omochao_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which spawns several Omochao around the player

options.name: timestop_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which briefly stops time

options.name: confusion_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes the controls to be skewed for a period of time

options.name: tiny_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes the player to become tiny

options.name: gravity_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which increases gravity

options.name: exposition_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which tells you the story

options.name: ice_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes the world slippery

options.name: slow_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes you gotta go slow

options.name: cutscene_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes you watch an unskippable cutscene

options.name: reverse_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which reverses your controls

options.name: literature_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to read

options.name: controller_drift_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes your control sticks to drift

options.name: poison_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes you to lose rings over time

options.name: bee_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which spawns a swarm of bees

options.name: pong_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pong minigame

options.name: breakout_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Breakout minigame

options.name: fishing_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Fishing minigame

options.name: trivia_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Trivia minigame

options.name: pokemon_trivia_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pokemon Trivia minigame

options.name: pokemon_count_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pokemon Count minigame

options.name: number_sequence_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Number Sequence minigame

options.name: light_up_path_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Light Up Path minigame

options.name: pinball_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pinball minigame

options.name: math_quiz_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to solve a math problem

options.name: snake_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Snake minigame

options.name: input_sequence_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to press a sequence of inputs

options.name: minigame_trap_difficulty
options.description:
How difficult any Minigame-style traps are
Chaos causes the difficulty to be random per-minigame

options.name: big_fishing_difficulty
options.description:
How difficult Big's Fishing Minigames are
Chaos causes the difficulty to be random per-minigame

options.name: sadx_music
options.description:
Whether the randomizer will include Sonic Adventure DX Music in the music pool

SA2B: Only SA2B music will be played

SADX: Only SADX music will be played

Both: Both SA2B and SADX music will be played

NOTE: This option requires the player to own a PC copy of SADX and to follow the addition steps in the setup guide.

options.name: music_shuffle
options.description:
What type of Music Shuffle is used

None: No music is shuffled.

Levels: Level music is shuffled.

Full: Level, Menu, and Additional music is shuffled.

Singularity: Level, Menu, and Additional music is all replaced with a single random song.

options.name: voice_shuffle
options.description:
What type of Voice Shuffle is used

None: No voices are shuffled.

Shuffled: Voices are shuffled.

Rude: Voices are shuffled, but some are replaced with rude words.

Chao: All voices are replaced with chao sounds.

Singularity: All voices are replaced with a single random voice.

options.name: narrator
options.description: Which menu narrator is used

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
